entryPoint.notes: Fires automatically when AuthProvider mounts (inside AppWithAuth, before App renders). Calls checkAuthBypass() to detect backend dev-mode bypass. If bypass succeeds, App.jsx never renders LoginForm.

calls.notes: If response.data.skipAuth is truthy, sets state to { user: { email: 'dev@docvault.local', role: 'admin' }, isAuthenticated: true }. Network errors are swallowed silently; LoginForm remains visible.

entryPoint.notes: Triggered by form onSubmit event. Calls e.preventDefault() then delegates to AuthContext.login(email, password). Catches any thrown error and writes it to this.state.error for display.

calls.notes: Backend validates against hardcoded credentials (admin@docvault.local / docvault123). Returns { token, refreshToken } on 200; 400 if fields missing; 401 if credentials wrong.

BUG (FR-007): backend returns { session: { userId, email, createdAt } } instead of { token, refreshToken }. The next line (refreshResponse.data.token.split('.')) throws TypeError because refreshResponse.data.token is undefined.

refreshResponse.data.token is undefined. Always throws 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading split)'. Execution falls to catch block; error state is set and exception is re-thrown to LoginForm.handleSubmit.
